title: La zandunga
writer: Salvador Novo, Rafael M. Saavedra, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Lupe Velez, Rafael Falcón, Arturo de Córdova
plot: Lupe (Velez) is in love with the sailor Juancho (De Cordova) but is also courted by Ramón (Falcon) and old Don Atanasio (Icardo). Juancho leaves town but promises to return. Time goes by and Juancho doesn't get back. Don Atanasio ...
